description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 26, 2024 at 5:57 PM PT, a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California, was involved 
in a collision involving a passenger car at the intersection of Venice Boulevard and Vermont Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling west on Venice Blvd, and approaching Vermont Ave in the leftmost of two through lanes proceeding 
straight. As the Waymo AV began to enter the intersection after the traffic light turned yellow, an eastbound passenger car, waiting to make 
a left turn onto northbound Vermont Ave, proceeded to initiate a left turn during the yellow traffic signal, and impacted the Waymo AV on 
the front driver side. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained 
damage and required towing services; the passenger in the passenger car reported a minor injury. 
Print
Clear Form
